title: Anthropic Just Dropped a Masterclass on Building Agent Harnesses (for Large Codebases)
summary: Cole Medin demonstrates how to build an agent harness architecture for Claude Code in large codebases, based on Anthropic's published playbook. The AI Layer includes CLAUDE.md hierarchies, self-improving hooks, scoped skills, LSP, MCPs, and subagents as integrated components.
